channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 25 cm pot hole, 18th March
item.description:
Previously reported but only one was repaired

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willowbrook Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human excrement, 18th March
item.description:
Please clear this heap of human waste including waste paper at the entrance of woods as indicated ...obviously yet another Taxi driver caught short leaving his mark owing to all local public toilets having been closed! Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaning street lamp, 18th March
item.description:
Noticed street lamp has a significant lean. Looks like the base was knocked.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Water seems to be still here., 18th March
item.description:
Reports this months ago, it’s the same since I reported it last. The water never goes and even with no rainfall. Seems there is a leakage and needs to be investigated as clearly this wasn’t before. I drive past many times, different hours days ect and it’s never changed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A 2 meter crack of raised tarmac breaking up, 18th March
item.description:
Cracked tarmac on the footpath is breaking up now and becoming dangerous for pedestrians cyclist wheelchair users been reported for years and nothing done but now its getting worse

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sewell Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement of assorted rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
Fly tipping causing obstruction and needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Manor Mount, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose curb stone reported last year after accident and still not fixed, 18th March
item.description:
Loose curb stone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southgate Circus, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th March
item.description:
Reported several weeks ago, "action being taken" - nothing has happened. This bin is closed to someone's front door, overflowing with food related waste, attracting rats. Fly tipping at it's worst. Please update "Action"

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Salusbury Road junction with harvist blocked gully, 18th March
item.description:
Blocked gully Was sorted last year so may be reoccurring problem

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 potholes 40mm deep, 500mm wide on the Westward A127 slip road which leads to Hall Lane. There are at least another three smaller potholes in the same area., 18th March
item.description:
3 potholes 40mm deep, 500mm wide on the Westward A127 slip road which leads from A127 to Hall Lane. There are at least another three smaller potholes in the same area. Plus numerous cracks in the road surface.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Arterial Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 18th March
item.description:
In road outside 58 Kingswood Avenue da17 5hg
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Avenue, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 52a prince of wales rd, 18th March
item.description:
The fields beneath cafe are obstructing the use of the bike stand by pushing their customer table right up to it making it useable only for one bike instead of three. They are also chaining said table to the bike stand.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince of Wales Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti with racist language used, 18th March
item.description:
On the bus stop time table stand opposite leesons primary school on meesons hill, has racist language on.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at the top of Karen Court on Blyth Road, 18th March
item.description:
Sadly as I’ve came home today I’ve seen that someone has fly tipped in my parking space which is located in Karen Court. I have CCTV footage of two males reversing into the court and dumping a corner sofa in my bay. They attempted to tape their number plate which wasn’t successful. The number plate on the vehicle is YP13 MWA. After conducting more research the plate matches the vehicle description (white Ford, N1 vehicle type (tipper). The vehicle has recently had a new owner on the V5C (Jan, 2026). I have more footage that I am willing to share if you need evidence to prosecute these low life degenerates. The sofa is currently on Blyth Road and will need removing. I really hope this matter gets dealt with and these people face the right punishment! Thanks, John 07539261943

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Karen Court, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Couches dumped on council land, 18th March
item.description:
Couches have been dumped on public land.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Palace Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
